The exact superscript/qualifier after ℵ in '(improb α ... fort postea ras)' is difficult to read precisely at this resolution.

notes: Running head and main body otherwise match. Apparatus mostly correct; only clear issues are a few sigla/nomina sacra details and one body spelling plus a captured marginal line number.
